ggsegDestrieux.title: Destrieux Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem
ggsegDestrieux.description:
Destrieux cortical atlas (aparc.a2009s) for the
'ggsegverse' ecosystem.  Provides a 'ggseg_atlas' object with
2D polygon geometry for use with 'ggsegverse'.

ggsegYeo2011.title: Yeo 2011 Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegYeo2011.description:
Yeo 2011 resting-state network atlases for the 'ggseg'
ecosystem. Provides 'ggseg_atlas' objects with 2D polygon
geometry for use with 'ggseg'. Includes both 7-network and
17-network parcellations.

ggsegSchaefer.title: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegSchaefer.description:
Schaefer cortical atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem.
Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' objects with both 2D polygon
geometry and 3D vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg' and
'ggseg3d'. Includes 7-network and 17-network parcellations at
resolutions from 100 to 1000 parcels.

ggsegPower.title: Power Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegPower.description:
Power functional network cortical parcellation atlas for
the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object
with 2D polygon geometry for use with 'ggseg'.

ggsegKleist.title: Kleist Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegKleist.description:
Historical Kleist functional segregation atlas for the
'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with
both 2D polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices, for use with
'ggseg' and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegICBM.title: ICBM Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegICBM.description:
ICBM white matter atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem.
Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with 3D mesh geometry,
for use with 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegIca.title: ICA Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegIca.description:
Probabilistic independent component analysis (ICA)
cortical atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified
'ggseg_atlas' object with 2D polygon geometry for use with
'ggseg'.

ggsegGordon.title: Gordon Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegGordon.description:
Gordon resting-state cortical parcellation atlas for the
'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with
2D polygon geometry for use with 'ggseg'.

ggsegFlechsig.title: Flechsig Myelogenetic Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegFlechsig.description:
Flechsig myelogenetic cortical atlas for the 'ggseg'
ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with both 2D
polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg'
and 'ggseg3d'. Based on the supplementary materials of
Pijnenburg et al. (2021).

ggsegEconomo.title: Economo Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegEconomo.description:
Economo & Koskinas 1925 historical cytoarchitectonic atlas
for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas'
object with both 2D polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices, for
use with 'ggseg' and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegDKT.title: Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Atlas for the ggseg-Plotting Tool
ggsegDKT.description:
Desikan-Killiany-Tourville cortical atlas for the ggseg
ecosystem. Contains 2D polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices.

ggsegCampbell.title: Campbell Cortical Atlas (1905) for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegCampbell.description:
Campbell (1905) cortical atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem.
Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with both 2D polygon
geometry and 3D vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg' and
'ggseg3d'.

ggsegBrodmann.title: Brodmann Areas Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegBrodmann.description:
Brodmann areas atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a
unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with both 2D polygon geometry and
3D vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg' and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegBrainnetome.title: Brainnetome Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegBrainnetome.description:
Brainnetome atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a
'ggseg_atlas' object with 2D polygon geometry for use with
'ggseg'.

ggsegArslan.title: Arslan Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegArslan.description:
Arslan multi-level parcellation atlas for the 'ggseg'
ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with both 2D
polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg'
and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegAicha.title: AICHA Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegAicha.description:
AICHA (Atlas of Intrinsic Connectivity of Homotopic Areas)
atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified
'ggseg_atlas' object with both 2D polygon geometry and 3D
vertex indices, for use with 'ggseg' and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegAAL.title: AAL Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegAAL.description:
AAL (Automated Anatomical Labeling) atlases for the
'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' objects for
AAL2 (cortical, Rolls et al. 2015) and AAL3 (cortical,
subcortical, cerebellum, Rolls et al. 2020), with both 2D
polygon geometry and 3D vertex/mesh data for use with 'ggseg'
and 'ggseg3d'.

ggsegGlasser.title: Glasser Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegGlasser.description:
Glasser multi-modal cortical parcellation (HCP) atlas for
the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object
with 2D polygon geometry for use with 'ggseg'.

ggsegHO.title: Harvard-Oxford Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem
ggsegHO.description:
Harvard-Oxford cortical atlas for the 'ggseg' ecosystem.
Provides a unified 'ggseg_atlas' object with 2D polygon
geometry for use with 'ggseg'.

ggsegTracula.title: Tracula datasets for the ggseg-plotting tool
ggsegTracula.description:
This is a support package for the ggseg, and ggseg3d
packages. It contains the Tracula atlases to plot using
functions from those two packages.

ggsegChen.title: Chen datasets for the ggseg-plotting tool
ggsegChen.description:
This is a support package for the ggseg, and ggseg3d
packages. It contains the Chen atlases to plot using functions
from those two packages.

ggsegJHU.title: JHU datasets for the ggseg-plotting tool
ggsegJHU.description:
This is a support package for the ggseg, and ggseg3d
packages. It contains the JHU atlases to plot using functions
from those two packages.
